svg.text: 6 APIs · bilingual (PT + EN) · tidy tibble output
batch helpers loop over a UF's municipalities with attr('failed') / attr('no_data')
tidy layer reconciles RREO label drift across years (inst/extdata/rreo_layout.csv)
apiapex.tesouro.gov.br/aria/v1/ · single response · Treasury codes (not IBGE)
supports server-side filter, select, orderby (OData syntax, uppercase column names)
HTTP 400: not retried, actionable error message
